allow: Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(l\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('link'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('linkedin'\)\).join\('\\n'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(l\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => !k.includes\('Icon'\) && !k.includes\('Lucide'\) && k.length < 20\).slice\(0, 80\).sort\(\).join\('\\n'\)\)")
